mapper.sql: select c.comment_id, c.report_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.reply_to_comment_id, c.shop_user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar, ru.user_name as reply_to_user_name, ru.nick_name as reply_to_nick_name, c.content, c.del_flag, c.create_time, c.update_time from shop_verification_report_comment c inner join shop_user u on u.user_id = c.shop_user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join shop_verification_report_comment rc on rc.comment_id = c.reply_to_comment_id left join shop_user ru on ru.user_id = rc.shop_user_id and ru.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: where c.report_id = #{reportId} and c.del_flag = '0' order by coalesce(c.parent_comment_id, c.comment_id), case when c.parent_comment_id is null then 0 else 1 end, c.create_time, c.comment_id
where c.report_id = #{reportId} and c.comment_id = #{commentId} and c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_verification_report_comment (report_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_comment_id, shop_user_id, content, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{reportId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{replyToCommentId}, #{shopUserId}, #{content}, '0', sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_verification_report_comment set del_flag = '2', delete_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where report_id = #{reportId} and comment_id = #{commentId} and shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and del_flag = '0'

update shop_verification_report_comment set del_flag = '2', delete_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where report_id = #{reportId} and del_flag = '0' and (comment_id = #{rootCommentId} or parent_comment_id = #{rootCommentId}) and exists ( select 1 from ( select comment_id from shop_verification_report_comment where report_id = #{reportId} and comment_id = #{rootCommentId} and shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and del_flag = '0' ) owned_root )
